title: huperzia phelpsii
intro: Huperzia phelpsii, also known as Phelps' club moss, is a species of plant in the Huperzia genus, belonging to the family Huperziaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to the presence of huperzine A, a natural alkaloid with neuroprotective and acetylcholinesterase-inhibiting activities. The health benefits of Huperzia phelpsii include potential applications in treating neurodegenerative diseases, improving cognitive function, and reducing inflammation. Huperzine A can be extracted and prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, for use in traditional medicine and as a dietary supplement.
